title: TRIBAL MEMBER SERVICES - 211info
text: GOVERNMENT OFFICE TRIBAL MEMBER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF General office for intake and information for services and programs. 1245 Fulton Avenue Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Federally recognized tribal members or children of tribal members Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 888-9577 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 888-9577 Toll-free (800) 280-0726 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Coos, Curry, Douglas, Lane, and Lincoln Counties Services: Native American General Assistance Specialized Information and Referral * Native American Community Tribal Council Offices Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - DOWN PAYMENT LOAN ASSISTANCE PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - EMERGENCY ASSISTANCE/HOMELESS PREVENTION HOUSING/SHELTER - HOME REPAIR PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - RENTAL ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - TRIBAL HOUSING MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CIRCLES OF HEALING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GOVERNMENT OFFICE
